case_title: WEI JIAN LIN VS. MYUN OK KIM

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIN, WEI JIAN AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, MYUN OK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2012 BY BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, WEI JIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIM, MYUN OK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
